debug_info.goal:
hyp : ∃ x, ∃ (_ : 4 < x), ∃ x_1, ∃ (_ : allExpert (after x x_1)), x_1.length < 2 * x - 4
m : ℕ
m_is_minimal : ∀ n < m, ¬∃ (_ : 4 < n), ∃ x, ∃ (_ : allExpert (after n x)), x.length < 2 * n - 4
le_m : 4 < m
S : List (Call m)
S_allExp : allExpert (after m S)
S_len_lt : S.length ≤ 2 * m - 5
is_minimal_m : is_minimal m
noHo_S : noHo m S
initPart : List (Call m) := List.filter (fun c => isInitialCall m S c) S
midPart : List (Call m) := List.filter (fun c => decide (¬isInitialCall m S c = true ∧ ¬isFinalCall m S c = true)) S
finalPart : List (Call m) := List.filter (fun c => isFinalCall m S c) S
this✝ : S.length = initPart.length + midPart.length + finalPart.length
this : m / 2 = initPart.length
⊢ m / 2 = finalPart.length

rw [List.length_filter]
    have : (fun c => isFinalCall m S c) = (fun c => isInitialCall m S.reverse c) := by
      funext c
      simp [isFinalCall, isInitialCall, final, initial]
      rfl
    rw [this]
    rw [List.length_filter]
    have : S.reverse.length = S.length := by simp
    have : List.filter (fun c => isInitialCall m S.reverse c) S.reverse =
           List.filter (fun c => isInitialCall m S.reverse c) S.reverse := by rfl
    have : List.filter (fun c => isInitialCall m S.reverse c) S.reverse = initPart.reverse := by
      sorry
    sorry

      omega
    have : finalPart.length * 2 = m := by
      -- Use symmetry between initial and final calls in a minimal noHo sequence

      rw [← this]
      congr

      simp [isInitialCall, isFinalCall, isAgentInitialCall, isAgentFinalCall]

    omega
